success.description: You primp and preen. Place any 2 dice from the pool onto this card preserving the rolled face of each. At any time, when you or an enemy within close range makes a check that includes a die of a type you have on this card, you may take the die on this card and place it in the results pool instead of rolling that particular die. Both dice can be spent on the same check, or used on different checks. This card doesn't recharge until both dice are spent

chaosStar.description: Place 1 less die from the pool onto this card

sigmarsComet.description: If the check was successful, place 1 extra die from the pool onto this card

At any time, when you make a check that includes a die of a type you have on this card, you may take the die on this card and place it in the results pool instead of rolling that particular die. Both dice can be spent on the same check, or used on different checks. This card doesn't recharge until both dice are spent
As above, and you gain the Inspired condition while this card recharges

chaosStar.description: Suffer 1 fatigue for each die placed on this card

sigmarsComet.description: If the check was successful, place 1 extra die from the pool onto this card
